Transcript: Good day, this is an important Product Safety recall notice from Costco Wholesale. please note that between august and december two thousand five you may have purchased a set of white outdoor led christmas lights costco item number five zero one seven zero one or i said a blue outdoor led christmas lights costco item number five zero one seven zero two both manufactured by universal lights both light sets were sold in packs of three boxes there have been some incidents of electrical malfunction with this item immediately unplug and remove these lights and return them to costco for a full refund if he gave these lights if someone is a gift please ask him to immediately return them to us for a full refund No other light sets are affected by this recall. For further information, please call Costco at one 804. Thank you.
